title: Wano Celebrates Liberation
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Momonosuke, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Kaido, Orochi as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Onami! Those two fiends are picking on me again!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Please save me!!()

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Kya!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Get off me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: B-But I'm still 8 years old!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Oh, I guess that's true...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Not that this hurts...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Yup, he's definitely tougher.

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Gahaha!! Welcome to adulthood momo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: No more "Special privileges" for you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: He's still a child on the inside,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But on the outside, he's basically open now!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Quit putting plates on my head!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You should thank your parents for giving you such a strong body!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sure you'll be the number one samural in the country someday!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I will give it my all!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: YAMATO!! Let's take a bath together before the festival!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Your Vigil has ended, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Vigil?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In Wano, they have a custom to give something up...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...until their prayers are answered by the gods.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I swore not to eat or bathe until the two of you recovered!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seriously?! Thanks, yamabro!! That must be why I'm feeling so great!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What a Good Person!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'm surprised we're not dirty our- selves.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's because I was in charge of wiping your bodies clean.:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Does that please you? TEEHE~()

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Moss Head, You Bastard, How Could You?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After the dust settles, if... if I'm no longer myself...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...I want you to put me down!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Oh yeah...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I must've returned from hell to fulfill my promise to kill you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't need your help with that anymore!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This castle doesn't have mixed baths, so I'll pass, Nami!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, I would like to join if you are okay with that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Castle onsen

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It's Bath Time!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The banquet is being held today!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Men's bath

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The temperature is just right!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, this is the best!! When we're done, let's party!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Is this a dream?!

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: Y-YAMATO.... YOU...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Women's bath

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The guys sure are loud...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hope I become bewitching too one day!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I always used to bathe with open-sama and the others before...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but it would be too embarrassing to join men I'm not used to.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "You look just like you did back then, Okiku-chan!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I think I'm older than you now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It's time to really celebrate...

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: ...the return of the Kozuki clan!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Get word out to every region!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Tokage Port, upon

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Phew! We finally got everything ship-shape!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Yup! They look ready to sail!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: General Franky is as good as new too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: That's so cool!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hehehe!

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 59 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
